basic_details.job_title: DWCD Kondagaon Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Gender Expert, IT Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Women and Child Development Office Kondagaon
basic_details.post_name: Gender Expert, Financial Literacy and Coordination Expert, IT Assistant
basic_details.short_information: District Women and Child Development Office Kondagaon (DWCD Kondagaon) Gender Expert, Financial Literacy and Coordination Expert, IT Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 15 June 2026 on the official website of DWCD Kondagaon. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the DWCD Kondagaon Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: For Gender Expert: up to 50 years for local residents. For other posts: up to 45 years for local residents. As per Chhattisgarh government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Social Work or related social fields, Graduate in Economics/Banking or related fields, Graduate in Computer/IT
qualification.details: Gender Expert: Graduate degree in Social Work or other social fields. Good knowledge of computer and MS Office and ability to work in computer typing. Minimum 3 years experience in gender related work in government/semi-government/NGO institutions and minimum 3 years experience in women's issues. Desirable: Experience of working in computer in English language. Financial Literacy and Coordination Expert: Graduate degree in Economics/Banking or other similar fields. Good knowledge of computer including MS Office and computer typing mandatory and ability to work. Minimum 3 years experience in financial literacy/financial inclusion related work in government/semi-government/NGO institutions. Desirable: Experience of working in computer in English language. IT Assistant: Graduate degree in Computer/IT field. Good knowledge of computer including MS Office and computer typing mandatory and ability to work. Minimum 3 years experience in data management/process documentation, web based and webbased reporting format in government/semi-government/NGO institutions. Desirable: Experience of working in computer in English language.

selection_process: Merit List based on educational qualification (60 marks)
bonus for local residents (2 marks) Walk-in Interview/Skill Test (20 marks) Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DWCD Kondagaon Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DWCD Kondagaon Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DWCD Kondagaon Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download DWCD Kondagaon Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DWCD Kondagaon Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Gender Expert: Graduate degree in Social Work or other social fields. Good knowledge of computer and MS Office and ability to work in computer typing. Minimum 3 years experience in gender related work in government/semi-government/NGO institutions and minimum 3 years experience in women's issues. Desirable: Experience of working in computer in English language. Financial Literacy and Coordination Expert: Graduate degree in Economics/Banking or other similar fields. Good knowledge of computer including MS Office and computer typing mandatory and ability to work. Minimum 3 years experience in financial literacy/financial inclusion related work in government/semi-government/NGO institutions. Desirable: Experience of working in computer in English language. IT Assistant: Graduate degree in Computer/IT field. Good knowledge of computer including MS Office and computer typing mandatory and ability to work. Minimum 3 years experience in data management/process documentation, web based and webbased reporting format in government/semi-government/NGO institutions. Desirable: Experience of working in computer in English language.

content_sections.heading: DWCD Kondagaon Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: For Gender Expert: up to 50 years for local residents. For other posts: up to 45 years for local residents. As per Chhattisgarh government rules.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: DWCD Kondagaon Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Merit List based on educational qualification (60 marks), experience (18 marks), bonus for local residents (2 marks) Walk-in Interview/Skill Test (20 marks) Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DWCD Kondagaon Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DWCD Kondagaon recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DWCD Kondagaon recruitment is 09-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the posts of Gender Expert, Financial Literacy and Coordination Expert, and IT Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years and the maximum age limit is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Gender Expert post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Gender Expert post is Rs. 25700 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What are the educational qualifications required for the IT Assistant post?
faq.answer: A Graduate degree in Computer/IT field is required for the IT Assistant post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Merit List based on educational qualification and experience, followed by a Walk-in Interview/Skill Test and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations available?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxations are available. For Gender Expert, up to 50 years for local residents. For other posts, up to 45 years for local residents, as per Chhattisgarh government rules.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the Important Links section in this article.
